response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled individual contributor with real distributed-systems depth, but the gap between his current seniority (Staff/Senior Software Engineer) and this executive CTO mandate is too large to bridge. The role demands demonstrated team scaling from 10 to 30+, board-level communication, organizational design, and production multi-agent AI systems at commercial scale — none of which are evidenced anywhere in the resume. His AI/agent exposure amounts to roughly one month at re:cinq in a hands-on engineering capacity, not an architectural or leadership one. There is no indication of people management, hiring ownership, governance of outsourced delivery, or regulated-environment executive accountability in any prior role.
strengths: Genuine high-performance distributed-systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency microservices, demonstrating real backend depth
Broad polyglot engineering range (TypeScript, DLang, C++, embedded, mobile, GIS) suggesting strong architectural instincts across multiple layers of the stack
Early hands-on involvement with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of and active engagement with the technical domain the role requires
concerns: Zero people management or organizational leadership history: every role listed is individual contributor; no evidence of hiring, growing engineering leads, or scaling a team of any size

AI and LLM production experience is extremely thin — limited to approximately one month at re:cinq with no demonstrated track record of operating multi-agent systems at scale, under load, or in a regulated environment

No fintech infrastructure depth at the architectural level: RIDE Capital and Optilyz stints involved general application engineering, not credit-risk modeling, payment-flow design, compliance infrastructure, or embedded-finance systems

key_factors.factor: Absent executive and people leadership track record
Minimal and very recent AI/agent production experience
Solid distributed-systems and backend engineering foundation
